highlights: Commander bundle schema omits source_refs though launcher/protocol require it (stampede-commander.agent.md:254-273 vs stampede.sh:816,1013)
Runtime bundles include source_refs but docs lack field; schema drift (run artifacts)
Inconsistent adopted consensus field naming: adopted_consensus_item_ids vs adopted_consensus (commander-001 vs commander-003)
Bundle example lacks field guidance for consensus.notes/source_refs/broadcasts; atom references source_refs without schema
